caption: A person's hands hold a small, rectangular clear acrylic case containing a card with text and a signature, featuring the name "HORUS WAGNER." The case is being tilted and rotated to show different angles. In the background, a man with a beard wearing a black t-shirt is visible in a smaller inset window, sitting in a room with equipment. The main scene takes place over a surface with a palm tree pattern. A logo and website address, "JASPYS CASEBREAKS.COM," appears in the upper right of each frame. The card inside the case contains a block of text and a signature that reads "T. Valentino." The scene transitions from a front-facing view of the card to a side-profile view as the person's hands shift the acrylic case, revealing its thickness and the way the card is mounted inside.
